title: Identity Preserved Led Mirror Bathroom Portrait Edit AI
sourceTitle: Identity Preserved Led Mirror Bathroom Portrait Edit AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Image-to-image 8K ultra-realistic LED mirror bathroom portrait preserving facial structure, eye shape, skin tone, hairline, and natural age impression. Subject: The same reference subject preserves facial structure, eye shape, skin tone, hairline, and natural age impression, leans slightly forward with both hands on a modern sink, wears a black fitted crew-neck shirt, a silver chain, and shows quiet focused intensity. Scene: Modern cinematic bathroom with glowing LED mirror, dark reflective surfaces, shallow depth of field, sink foreground, and moody night atmosphere. Composition: Vertical 2:3 portrait with the subject leaning into the sink, mirror glow framing the face, both hands grounded on the basin, and the preserved face as the sharp focal point. Signature Elements: Both hands on modern sink, forward lean, glowing LED mirror, black shirt or dark wardrobe, silver chain, dark cinematic bathroom light, sharp preserved face, and reflective sink surfaces. Style: 8K ultra-realistic cinematic portrait photography with dark bathroom atmosphere, LED mirror glow, sharp face detail, realistic skin texture, and premium moody editorial finish. Color Palette: Deep charcoal bathroom shadows, cool LED whites, muted skin tones, black or dark wardrobe, silver chain highlights, and restrained cinematic contrast. Lighting: Glowing LED mirror as primary face light, dark cinematic bathroom falloff, subtle rim highlights on shoulders and chain, shallow depth of field, and controlled reflective surfaces. Camera: 2:3 vertical crop, shallow depth of field, close editorial bathroom portrait, high-resolution facial focus, and intimate mirror-perspective framing. Restrictions: Use the uploaded or local reference as the identity source;

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
